name: Smoked Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a covered grill or make a cover for your grill with aluminum foil and clothes hangers.
2. Build two fires on each side of where the meat will be.
3. Place a drip pan (aluminum foil) with water under where the meat will be.
4. Soak smoking wood (preferably hickory) at least overnight.
5. Mix the spices together to make a dry rub. Rub the spice mixture on the trimmed beef roast and let marinate overnight in your refrigerator.
6. When the fire has developed to ash covered, add the smoking wood and the meat, cover, and don't peek for at least 2 hours.
7. Add charcoal and smoke for another 2 hours. Adjust as necessary. The slower you smoke, the longer it will take and the more tender the meat will be.
